videos.title: AI Robots Join Armed SWAT Police And Shock The Public Worldwide
videos.summary_source_text:
AI Robots Join Armed SWAT Police And Shock The Public Worldwide AI robots are moving from labs into real streets. China has already shown humanoid robots walking with SWAT officers, guiding traffic, helping police patrol public areas, and working alongside drones and smart patrol systems. At the same time, cheaper humanoids, advanced robots like KAI, mass-produced home robots like NEO, and Meta’s new robotics push show how fast this shift is getting real.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉️ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@science.revolution

🧠 What You’ll See
0:00 Intro
0:34 How China put humanoid robots on the streets with SWAT officers
SOURCE: https://www.facebook.com/frontlinestoriesfromreporters/videos/future-policing-humanoid-robot-joins-police-patrol-on-shenzhen-streetsa-humanoid/2786245985107522/
2:08 Why Guangzhou used robots, drones, and scooters in a smart patrol system
SOURCE: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=waFf9YRZuBs
4:01 How Hangzhou deployed humanoid robots to help direct traffic
SOURCE: https://www.globaltimes.cn/page/202605/1360253.shtml
4:52 Unitree Drops Humanoid to $4,290
6:23 KAI: 115 Degrees of Freedom
7:59 1X NEO Hits Mass Production
9:06 Meta Quietly Buys Into Humanoids
9:50 How humanoid traffic robots were used during peak holiday crowds
SOURCE: https://www.scmp.com/video/china/3352391/humanoid-traffic-police-robots-deployed-streets-chinas-tech-hub-hangzhou

🚨 Why It Matters
Humanoid robots are starting to leave controlled demos and enter real public spaces. They are being tested for patrols, traffic control, public messaging, home assistance, and security support. The big shift is that hardware is getting cheaper, AI is getting stronger, and governments and companies are now looking for real-world uses at the same time.

#ai #robots #robotics AI robots are moving from labs into real streets. China has already shown humanoid robots walking with SWAT officers, guiding traffic, helping police patrol public areas, and working alongside drones and smart patrol systems. At the same time, cheaper humanoids, advanced robots like KAI, mass-produced home robots like NEO, and Meta’s new robotics push show how fast this shift is getting real.

videos.title: Hockey Players Widen Your Stance
videos.summary_source_text:
Hockey Players Widen Your Stance The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: HALL-ELUJAH! Carolina Hurricanes Come Back to Win 3-2 in Overtime in Game 2
videos.summary_source_text:
HALL-ELUJAH! Carolina Hurricanes Come Back to Win 3-2 in Overtime in Game 2 The Carolina Hurricanes take a 2-0 series lead after defeating the Philadelphia Flyers 3-2 in overtime. It was the first time in all the playoffs that the Hurricanes had to come back from behind. In the end, they came back from 2-0 down to secure the win. What stood out in the game? On the Tuesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on Game 2 as a whole. From the early deficit to Nikolaj Ehlers' PPG to the Seth Jarvis and Taylor Hall goals, a lot was going on in the game. Also, Frederik Andersen once again stepped up big, especially after the two goals in 36 seconds. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on the first two games of the series and what it means for the Hurricanes as Round 2 shifts to Philadelphia. Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing what he could expect in Game 3 with the Flyers down 2-0 and having to come back from the 3-2 loss. Also, who is Zach keeping an eye on as the Hurricanes go on the road for Games 3 & 4? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Keep the Belt Ahead of the Buttons  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Keep the Belt Ahead of the Buttons  #golfswing #golftips A great way to avoid reverse spine angle and improve your body motion is to make sure the belt stays ahead of the buttons throughout the swing. When the chest outraces the lower body, the upper body tilts the wrong way and creates poor rotation patterns. Leading with the belt keeps your hips and torso sequencing correctly, helping you stay in posture and rotate more efficiently. This simple cue creates a better backswing, a cleaner transition, and a more stable downswing.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. In this live lesson, we worked with Christina, who was dealing with all three — poor contact, weak shots, and inconsistent direction. The interesting part? It wasn’t a downswing issue.

If your golf swing feels inconsistent, this lesson will help you understand what might really be going wrong.

videos.title: This One Iron Tip Would’ve Saved Me Years of Fat Shots
videos.summary_source_text:
This One Iron Tip Would’ve Saved Me Years of Fat Shots Struggling with fat iron shots and inconsistent contact? You are not alone. Most golfers trying to fix fat shots focus on the wrong things and never truly understand how to create clean, compressed strikes.

In this video, I break down the ONE key move that stops fat iron shots instantly and helps you strike the ball first, then the turf exactly how the pros do it.

This is the same move almost every golfer I coach was missing. Once you understand it, you will start hitting crisp irons, better compression and more consistent shots almost immediately.

If you are tired of chunking your irons and want that pure, solid strike every time, this is a must watch

videos.title: The BEST Back Exercise You HAVEN’T Tried
videos.summary_source_text:
The BEST Back Exercise You HAVEN’T Tried One the best ways to build bigger lats is with a kneeling single arm pulldown, however, not everyone has access to a functional trainer or cable machine. However, a more common piece of equipment you will find in just about any gym and even some well equipped home gyms, is lat pulldown setup.

While lat pulldowns are great builders for the lats, there is something that the single arm pulldown does that the lat pulldown doesn’t — the ability to achieve peak contraction on the lats.

This is due to the fact that the lat pulldown, performed traditionally, has a limited range of motion due to the fixed nature of the bar. That doesn’t mean we can’t get a bette contraction, however.

Simply trade in the traditional lat pulldown for a rocking lat pulldown. The execution is simple, start the movement as you would a traditional lat pulldown, but once you reach the height of your head, begin to pull favorably with one side. This will allow you to drive your elbow back towards your back pockets; one of the cues used on the single arm pulldown down with a cable setup.

By getting a better contraction, you’re exploring a greater range of motion on the lats that you wouldn’t normally find performing a traditional lat pulldown.

When it comes to building muscle, the entire range of motion is important, not just the lengthened position. Building strength and resiliency throughout the full range of motion of the muscle is also important for preventing injury. Avoiding injury is one of the key factors of training longevity and being able to build muscle as you age so full range of motion should not be ignored.

or more tips on how to build muscle and get bigger lats, be sure to stay tuned to this channel and remember to subscribe so that you never miss another video from a physical therapist with a pro sports background as a PT and strength coach.

Jag åker världens bästa elbil?! Xiaomi SU7 Xiaomi utmanar Tesla och Porsche med teknikfrossa och extrem prestanda.

Xiaomi, ursprungligen kända för sina telefoner, har på kort tid blivit en glödhet aktör på elbilsmarknaden. Med modeller som SU7 och den extrema YU7 Ultra siktar de på att slå konkurrenterna genom sömlös integration mellan mobil, hem och bil, samt prestanda som får etablerade sportbilstillverkare att svettas. Och mycket bra priser. 
Men bakom den imponerande tekniken och de attraktiva priserna finns teknikutmaningar, skandaler  och en byggkvalitet som i vissa fall påminner om Teslas tidiga problem.

In This Video, You'll Discover:

• A golf drill to eliminate the pulls and fades that plague the high handicap golfer  
• Fix your cupped wrist at the top 
• Stop guessing at your golf swing tips and start using the "feel exaggerated, look perfect" principle to know your practice reps are actually doing the right thing 
• Build a repeatable two-part practice routine that compounds real results over weeks and months

In this real-time lesson, Eric Cogorno works through a complete golf swing analysis with a student struggling with pulls, fades, and an over-the-top path — two of the most common issues facing any high handicap golfer. Eric diagnoses the root causes (under-plane takeaway and excessive late wrist hinge) and builds a clear, drill-based plan the student can take to the driving range immediately. This is the kind of practical, no-fluff golf instruction that turns stalled games into real improvement..

videos.title: My NEW In The Golf Bag is Game Changing
videos.summary_source_text:
My NEW In The Golf Bag is Game Changing If you told me a few years ago that my golf bag would look like this, I would have laughed.

But things are changing. My swing is evolving, my body is getting stronger, and my ball speeds are climbing. To bridge the gaps in my game and prepare for my goal of competing in a Senior Tour event, I headed to the Srixon Performance Centre to work with their top tour fitters.

The result? A setup that might shock you.

In this video, I’m walking you through my entire 2026 In The Bag (WITB). We’re talking about why I’ve officially ditched my hybrids for utility irons, why I’m choosing "Game Improvement" irons over tour blades, and the driver setup that is giving me 157+ MPH ball speeds.

Whether you’re a gear head or just looking to fix the gaps in your own bag, there’s a lesson here: stop playing the clubs you think you should play, and start playing the ones that actually help you score.

In this video, you’ll see:

The "Ego" Irons: Why the Srixon ZXi Game Improvement irons are staying in the bag.
The Hybrid Killer: Why the ZXU 2-iron is more reliable for high-speed players.
Driver Tech: The truth about shaft weight (50g vs 60g) and stability.
The Putter "Ting": My surprising switch to a counterbalance mallet.

Are you a Hybrid or a Utility Iron player? Let me know in the comments!


FREE Golf Swing 101 Class here: https://www.markcrossfieldgolf.com/how-to-play-golf-101

videos.title: The #1 Magnesium Mistake Everyone Makes
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Magnesium Mistake Everyone Makes If you’re taking magnesium for sleep or muscle cramps and notice it’s not working, you could be making one of these common magnesium mistakes. Learn how to take magnesium correctly for the most magnesium benefits. Your health will thank you.

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/4u2VQcD

0:00 Introduction: Magnesium mistakes 
0:14 Magnesium dosage 
1:03 Magnesium RDA explained
3:29 Magnesium types explained 
4:58 The best magnesium supplement 
7:04 Magnesium deficiency symptoms  
14:01 Correcting magnesium deficiency and magnesium benefits 

Magnesium and Glutamate: 
https://youtu.be/OxCWlEJMS2U
https://youtu.be/CUY90EaVgXg 

Learn how to easily spot a magnesium deficiency and how to select the best magnesium supplements: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/7lSQ2hnycLg
▶️ https://youtu.be/vJFozt4pytg
▶️ https://youtu.be/1gGI_98xzgE

👉 Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4uN8yfF

The average recommended dose of magnesium is 350–420 mg, but this was never meant to optimize brain and nervous system function. It’s the bare minimum to prevent deficiency, not support optimal health.

The form of magnesium matters. Many supplements use magnesium oxide, which has very low absorption and can limit results.

Magnesium glycinate is one of the best forms, with high absorption and better tolerance for the digestive system.

Only about 1% of magnesium is found in the blood, making deficiency difficult to detect with standard blood tests. An RBC magnesium test is slightly better, but still not fully accurate.

To support healthy magnesium levels, take 300–400 mg of magnesium glycinate a few times per day. This can help support blood pressure, reduce palpitations, and improve sleep.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

The GREATEST putter ever made...🤔 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

buying your first proper set,

a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

videos.title: I bought a cheap ‘550hp’ Bentley, it was a DISASTER!
videos.summary_source_text:
I bought a cheap ‘550hp’ Bentley, it was a DISASTER! Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-0505

Did Mat make a huge mistake buying a Bentley Continental GT for just £10,200?

In this video, we’re putting our bargain-basement Bentley head-to-head with a pristine, well-maintained version of the exact same car, but this one is worth £30,000! Is the "mint" example really worth three times the price, and if so, is it worth Mat pouring in the cash to get our car to the same level?

Well, here’s the thing: we already know from a previous video that there are a whole load of issues with our car. We need to replace the front suspension, replace the handbrake motors, change warped brakes, and it also needs a major service and a new MOT. All in, the fix everything, it would cost over £25,000 to fix them all! 

What’s more, the 6-litre W12 should be producing 550hp, but in this instance ours is only putting down 320hp, so to get it back to producing what it should would cost an additional £8,000!

So we now have a massive decision to make. Do we cut our losses or double down? Here is how we tackle this dilemma:

For starters, we see how much the car is worth if we simply strip it and sell it in pieces. We then get the car professionally valeted to see if "looking the part" is enough to fool a specialist when compared to the £30k version, and then finally we attempt to fix only the bare essentials required to get it road-legal.

Can you actually save £20,000 by buying a "fixer-upper" Bentley, or did we just buy a very heavy, very expensive paperweight? Stick with Mat to find out!

Thanks to https://www.instagram.com/flyingspares for helping us with this video! Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-0505

videos.title: UK | 04th May, Monday -RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 04th May, Monday -RIFT Presentation 04/05/26

🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 04/05/26

videos.title: Will Either Goalie Have a Short Lease In Game 2 After the 15 Goal Game 1?
videos.summary_source_text:
Will Either Goalie Have a Short Lease In Game 2 After the 15 Goal Game 1? Colorado Avalanche face goalie questions after wild 15-goal Game 1 shootout against the Minnesota Wild. Will either team make a change in net for Game 2, or simply rely on a short leash for their starters? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down postgame reactions from Jared Bednar and John Hynes, examine Scott Wedgewood and Jesper Wallstedt’s resilience, and debate whether a goaltending switch or stronger defense is key for both clubs moving forward.

The conversation also spotlights standout performances, including Trent Miner's heroics with the Colorado Eagles in the Calder Cup playoffs, and dissects the race for the Bill Masterton Trophy with Gabriel Landeskog, Jonathan Toews, and Rasmus Dahlin as finalists. Predictions for Game 2, listener insights, and the impact of defensive adjustments take center stage as the Avalanche aim to build momentum in this high-octane playoff matchup.

videos.title: Control Starts with This Habit
videos.summary_source_text:
Control Starts with This Habit Silence can feel uncomfortable at first, especially when the instinct is to stay busy and keep moving. But over time, it builds the ability to focus and direct attention with intention. Instead of reacting to every thought, awareness becomes something that can be guided. This is where real control begins, not by doing more, but by learning to be still.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

videos.title: Your Mohawk 10-2 Is Wrong Without This Order
videos.summary_source_text:
Your Mohawk 10-2 Is Wrong Without This Order The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: 🔥 Oatmeal Chia Tiramisu! Dessert in a jar in 5 minutes. No white sugar.
videos.summary_source_text:
🔥 Oatmeal Chia Tiramisu! Dessert in a jar in 5 minutes. No white sugar. 🔥 Oatmeal Chia Tiramisu! Dessert in a jar in 5 minutes. No white sugar. Delicious, quick, and incredibly easy. Enjoy making it with a smile and a great mood!

3/4 cup (100 g) rolled oats. 1/4 cup (50 g) chia seeds.
1 banana.
1 cup (240 ml) coconut cream.
1/4 cup (50 g) sugar‑free peanut butter.
1/3 cup (80 g) sugar-free chocolate.
1 tbsp peanuts.
You can place it in the fridge overnight or enjoy it right away.

videos.title: Every Putt Given vs Auto 300 Yard Drive | Who Wins? (Peter Finch vs Ryan Ruffels)
videos.summary_source_text:
Every Putt Given vs Auto 300 Yard Drive | Who Wins? (Peter Finch vs Ryan Ruffels) This might be the most unbalanced golf match we’ve ever played…

I get every putt inside 12ft conceded — no pressure on the greens at all.
Ryan Ruffels (tour pro) starts every hole from 300 yards down the middle.

Sounds fair, right?

We put it to the test to see which advantage actually wins over 18 holes… and the result isn’t quite what you’d expect.

Let us know in the comments — who should win this?

For more info on my clothes and equipment in this video, check them out here: https://linktr.ee/finchgolfmedia

videos.title: I played with the NEW McLaren Golf Clubs!
videos.summary_source_text:
I played with the NEW McLaren Golf Clubs! I’m taking the new McLaren golf clubs out for a proper test, playing 9 holes on the course to see if they actually live up to the hype.

I’ve already reviewed these on the HIT channel, but that was more of a first look. This time, I wanted to see how they perform in real conditions. No simulator, no perfect lies just real golf.

Throughout the round, I’ll be sharing my honest thoughts on the feel, distance, forgiveness, and whether they’re something I’d recommend to the audience.

Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

LIMITED EDITION MERCH (UK & US)
My new limited edition merch is now available — thanks so much for the incredible support!
UK viewers: https://uk.rickshiels.com
US viewers: https://us.rickshiels.com

MORE FROM ME
🎙 Podcast — The Rick Shiels Golf Show
https://www.youtube.com/@RickShielsGolfShow
🏌️‍♂️Golf equipment reviews — H.I.T Golf
Honest, independent testing of the latest drivers, irons, putters, golf balls and tech.

https://golf.ecco.com

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. I’m taking the new McLaren golf clubs out for a proper test, playing 9 holes on the course to see if they actually live up to the hype.

videos.title: K64. Fattigveckan: Jimmy levde på 100 kr i en vecka och livet blev rikare
videos.summary_source_text:
K64. Fattigveckan: Jimmy levde på 100 kr i en vecka och livet blev rikare Vad händer om du lever på 100 kronor mat i veckan, sover på golvet och bara får använda internet på biblioteket? Jimmy Andersson (@FireJimmy) hörde av sig till oss efter att ha blivit inspirerad att prova att göra en fattigvecka. Budgeten för veckan var 100 kr till mat, begränsad internetdelning, endast cykel som transportmedel och begränsad tillgång till internet. Caroline har provat en lightversion av utmaningen och delar sina perspektiv på utmaningen.

Personligen blev jag inte taggad alls efter att ha lyssnat på Jimmy och Caroline :rofl: Men jag förstår andemeningen med att verkligen ifrågasätta vad som är ett rikt liv för en själv. Likt Nassim Taleb brukar prata om “via negativa” - alltså förbättring genom borttagning. Se det här avsnittet som insyn i ett experiment och dela gärna dina tankar om avsnittet i kommentarerna.

5 guldkorn från avsnittet:
▸  Hundra kronor mat för hela veckan - Jimmy levde på ärtsoppa, havregrynsgröt, spagetti och knäckebröd — allt handlat på en gång för exakt hundra kronor. Mot slutet var det så tråkigt att han inte ens åt upp allt.

▸  Caroline klarade fyra dagar - hon gav upp inte av hunger utan för att hon saknade det som faktiskt betyder något för henne: kaffe, frukt, en ordentlig dusch och sin hudvård. Det var insikten i sig — att hon nu visste vad som spelade roll.

▸  Man kan inte simulera verklig fattigdom - Jimmys viktigaste insikt: det experimentet inte kan återskapa är den psykologiska otryggheten. Han vet hur det känns på riktigt — att leva på strax under hyran i A-kassa och inte veta när det tar slut. Den rädslan går inte att kopiera med en planerad vecka.

▸  Tacksamheten efteråt är verklig - Båda beskriver samma känsla när veckan var slut: en nästan överraskande uppskattning för det vanliga. Carolines ord: “Gud vad privilegierad jag är.”

▸  Light-versionen funkar också - Caroline rekommenderar att man anpassar utmaningen efter sig själv. Välj de begränsningar som faktiskt utmanar just dig, kör i tre dagar istället för sju om det känns mer rimligt. Effekten — perspektivet — brukar komma ändå.

Vi hoppas att du gillar avsnittet!
Jan, Caroline och Jimmy

Länkar:
====
▸ Jimmys bok Arbetsfri på Adlibris: https://www.adlibris.com/sv/bok/arbetsfri-9789189888258
▸ Jimmys Facebook sida: Det Gråa Guldet: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100032084246604
▸ Diskussion till avsnittet i forumet: https://rikatillsammans.se/forum/t/120765
https://youtu.be/LaXHzgXfrw4
https://youtu.be/PljsPfEjN5g

• Build a repeatable two-part practice routine that compounds real results over weeks and months

In this real-time lesson, Eric Cogorno works through a complete golf swing analysis with a student struggling with pulls, fades, and an over-the-top path — two of the most common issues facing any high handicap golfer. Eric diagnoses the root causes (under-plane takeaway and excessive late wrist hinge) and builds a clear, drill-based plan the student can take to the driving range immediately. This is the kind of practical, no-fluff golf instruction that turns stalled games into real improvement..

Whether you're a beginner just learning how to swing a golf club or a seasoned golfer aiming to refine your golf swing, this channel is here to help you master every aspect of your golf swing. With a blend of expert golf instruction, golf tips, practical golf lessons and honest equipment reviews, Mark Crossfield provides you with everything you need to play your best golf.

At Mark Crossfield Golf, we know that mastering your golf swing and perfecting your golf grip are fundamental to becoming a better golfer. Our videos dive deep into the essentials of a solid golf swing, teaching you how to swing a golf club with precision and power. From golf swing basics to advanced golf swing drills and techniques, we cover it all. Learn the importance of a proper golf grip. Whether you're looking to improve your golf swing takeaway or refine your golf swing tempo, we have the expert golf instruction you need.

Our channel offers a wide range of golf lessons tailored to golfers of all skill levels. If you're new to the game, our beginner golf content will guide you through the fundamentals, including the golf grip, golf stance, and how to execute a consistent golf swing. For more experienced players, we provide advanced golf lessons on topics like ball striking and perfecting your golf swing. Each golf lesson is designed to be practical and actionable, so you can apply what you learn directly on the golf course and start seeing results.

Choosing the right equipment is crucial for any golfer. We provide thorough reviews of the best drivers and best irons to help you make informed decisions. Whether you're searching for the best drivers for beginners or looking for high-performance golf clubs that can take your game to the next level, our reviews cover all the top options. Learn about the latest golf technology and discover which equipment is best suited for your game style. Our videos also explore how to use golf launch monitors and other golf training aids to improve your performance.

Every golfer knows that small adjustments can make a big difference. Our channel offers a wealth of golf swing tips designed to help you improve every part of your golf game. Learn how to hit the driver straight, avoid common mistakes, and develop a strategy for better golf shots. We provide detailed advice on mastering your short game and putting, ensuring you're equipped with the skills needed to lower your scores. From fixing your slice to hitting longer drives, our golf swing tips are here to help you play smarter and more efficiently.

Understanding the mechanics of your golf swing is key to improvement. Our slow motion golf swing analysis breaks down each part of the swing, helping you identify areas for refinement. By performing slow motion golf swing analysis, you can make precise adjustments that lead to more consistent and powerful golf shots. This in-depth approach to golf instruction is ideal for golfers who want to understand the finer points of their golf swing and improve their overall technique.

At Mark Crossfield Golf, we believe in building a community of passionate golfers. Join us as we explore every aspect of golf, from golf swing basics to golf lessons for advanced players. We encourage you to leave comments, ask questions, and share your experiences. Our community is all about learning, growing, and enjoying the game of golf together. By engaging with our content, you'll gain access to the best golf tips, golf lessons, golf swing advice and equipment reviews available.
Don’t miss out on the latest videos designed to help you improve your golf swing. By subscribing to our channel, you’ll receive regular updates on new golf tips, golf lessons, golf swing drills, and equipment reviews. Whether you want to refine your golf swing, find the best drivers, or just enjoy quality golf instruction, Mark Crossfield Golf Coaching has everything you need to play better golf and have more fun on the golf course. FREE Golf Swing 101 Class here: https://www.markcrossfieldgolf.com/how-to-play-golf-101

NOW AVAILABLE ONLINE LESSONS WITH MARK CROSSFIELD, check out his packages here: https://skillest.com/coach/markcrossfield

Check out all my affiliate deals here:
https://crossfieldgolf.info/Affiliate-Discounts

https://www.crossfieldgolf.com/

videos.title: LOGAN SMYTHEKOVEN! Carolina Hurricanes Take 1-0 Series Lead After 3-0 Shutout Win
videos.summary_source_text:
LOGAN SMYTHEKOVEN! Carolina Hurricanes Take 1-0 Series Lead After 3-0 Shutout Win The Carolina Hurricanes take a 1-0 series lead after winning 3-0 against the Philadelphia Flyers on Saturday night. The second line dominates again, and Frederik Andersen continues to play lights-out hockey. What stood out in the win? What should we expect for Game 2? On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes' Game 1 shutout win. What stood out in the game that saw the second line dominate again, Andersen being a brick wall, and a total of 68 PIMs given out? Who impressed Zach the most over the course of Game 1? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on who he thinks will be the front-runners of the Conn Smythe trophy. Does Logan Stankoven make a better case than Andersen or vice versa? Who has the edge through five games? Finally, Zach concludes the show with a brief preview of Monday night's Game 2 in Raleigh. What should fans expect, and who is Zach looking at to make an impact? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.
